description.content: User and API service account management
Returns all users in the organization. Paginated, max 20 per page.

response.name: List of users

description.content: Creates a new user or API service account in the organization.
Search users by term, API ID, role, type, or SAML status.

response.name: Search results

description.content: Returns the current authenticated user's principal details.
Updates an existing user account.
Deletes a user account from the organization.
API credential lifecycle management
Generates new API credentials for the current user.
Returns the expiration date for the current user's API credentials.
Returns expiration details for a specific API credential.
Revokes a set of API credentials.
Role and permission management
Returns all available roles.
Team management
Returns all teams in the organization.
Creates a new team in the organization.
Returns details for a specific team.
Updates an existing team.
Deletes a team from the organization.
Business unit management
Returns all business units in the organization.
Creates a new business unit.

The Veracode Identity REST API manages users, API service accounts, teams, business units, roles, and API credentials for a Veracode organization. Provides full CRUD operations for organizational identity and access management. Base URL: https://api.veracode.com/api/authn/v2
